title: JUVENILE DELINQUENCY AND
doc_html:
CHAPTER 13.  JUVENILE DELINQUENCY AND

GANG PREVENTION

§1421.  Short title

This Chapter may be cited as the "Juvenile Delinquency and Gang Prevention Act of 1993".  

Acts 1993, No. 461, §1.
